npcDirectionStatus: Existing v2047 NPC roles already provide 8 static directions; v2.1.18 keeps their direction switching and adds validation for all core NPC roles.
note: The uploaded zip contains 7 direction groups x 4 frames. v2.1.18 completes the 8-way player clock set by mirroring paired diagonal frames without changing actorDirectionFromVector, actorTextureUrl, or ACTOR_DIRECTION_TEXTURE_FIX.
landTilePolicy: grass uses non-blue legacy land tiles only; v2118 sea_and_beach water candidates are used only for sea/sand/wood families.
playerMotionCorrection: v2.1.19 replaced the corrected player northeast/northwest rod frames and source fisher direction 05 frames from uploaded v2118.zip.
playerDirectionCorrection: v2.1.20 corrected runtime player visual mapping for northwest/northeast and east/west after the fixed frame upload.
